name: Your Brand
product: What you make — e.g. statement caps, one-liners you wear on your head
audience: Describe who your posts are for: their sense of humor, their vibe, and why they'd follow you. The clearer this is, the better the captions.
voice: Describe your caption voice in a sentence or two. e.g. Deadpan and self-aware. A punchline, never a caption. Lowercase. Clever, never corporate — the joke does all the work.
registers: list the recurring themes your jokes hit
voice_examples: Replace these with 15-40 of your BEST real lines — the model imitates them directly, so this is the most important field.
Make them sound like a person, not a brand.
dont: sound like a brand or explain the joke
use hashtags inside the on-image text
